scripts.dev:neon: echo "USING NEON DB" && DATABASE_URL=$(sed -n 's/^DATABASE_URL="\\(.*\\)"$/\\1/p' .env.local.bak | head -n 1) next dev -p 3000 -H 127.0.0.1
scripts.db:reset:neon: echo "RESETTING NEON DB" && DATABASE_URL=$(sed -n 's/^DATABASE_URL="\\(.*\\)"$/\\1/p' .env.local.bak | head -n 1) prisma migrate reset --force --skip-seed
scripts.db:which: node -e "require('dotenv').config({path:'.env'}); if(!process.env.DATABASE_URL) { console.error('DATABASE_URL missing'); process.exit(1);} const u=new URL(process.env.DATABASE_URL); console.log(u.host+' / '+u.pathname.replace('/',''));"
scripts.db:which:neon: DATABASE_URL=$(sed -n 's/^DATABASE_URL="\(.*\)"$/\1/p' .env.local.bak | head -n 1) node -e "const u=new URL(process.env.DATABASE_URL); console.log(u.host+' / '+u.pathname.replace('/',''));"
scripts.prisma:regen: npx prisma format && rm -rf node_modules/.prisma && npx prisma generate --schema=prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.test:integration:prod: pnpm exec prisma migrate reset --force --skip-seed && node scripts/seed-test-fixtures.mjs && pnpm run build && timeout 300 bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; PORT=3000; : > /tmp/server.log; echo CI_BLOCK_START; if command -v lsof >/dev/null 2>&1; then kill -9 $(lsof -tiTCP:$PORT -sTCP:LISTEN) 2>/dev/null || true; fi; setsid pnpm run start -p $PORT >/tmp/server.log 2>&1 & SERVER_PID=$!; echo SERVER_PID=$SERVER_PID; sleep 1; if ! kill -0 $SERVER_PID 2>/dev/null; then echo SERVER_DIED_EARLY; tail -n 200 /tmp/server.log || true; exit 1; fi; pnpm exec wait-on --timeout 60000 http://127.0.0.1:$PORT/api/health; pnpm exec vitest run --environment node tests/integration/*.test.ts; TEST_CODE=$?; echo TEST_CODE=$TEST_CODE; kill -- -$SERVER_PID 2>/dev/null || true; sleep 1; kill -9 -- -$SERVER_PID 2>/dev/null || true; echo ---SERVER_LOG_TAIL---; tail -n 200 /tmp/server.log || true; echo CI_BLOCK_END; exit $TEST_CODE'
